name: Delboy's Potato Salad - Erblschlaat
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the potatoes until just tender.
2. Drain, then rinse under cold water for about a minute to stop further cooking and cool them down.
3. Peel or scrape the cooled potatoes, attempting to rub off as much of the skin as possible without removing too much flesh.
4. Slice into 1/4 inch thick pieces and add to a large bowl.
5. Add onion slices (not too thinly) and some capers and gherkins.
6. Stir in mayonnaise, salt, and pepper until evenly mixed. Ensure there is only a thin coating of mayo; too much can make the salad overly creamy and sickly.
7. Repeat with remaining ingredients, adding eggs roughly and mixing thoroughly.
8. Season well and refrigerate overnight to let flavors meld.
9. Before serving, mix again, taste, and add salt if needed due to the potatoes absorbing it quickly.
10. Optionally, cut additional hard boiled eggs into quarters and garnish with paprika or chopped parsley.
